creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
New test program coming, so please ignore this one.

There is something else needed to make this trigger more often, like "packets in queue for this interface" or an actual reader on the tunfd.

(OpenVPN test suite triggers this 90% for some cases, openvpn itself triggers in like 20% of all cases *with the same options* as if called by the test suite, test script in the version uploaded so far triggers in 1%...)
